response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Monologue audio and burnt-in subtitles match the provided reference text. Song lyrics align with the provided Reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized Reference JSON for monologue transcription and song lyrics. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed monologue and song lyrics precisely to vocal onset/offset. Included visual text for the main title and song credits. Applied instantaneous transitions (Line 1 'e' equals Line 2 's') in rapid song sections to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: The Great Ancient Detective's Bizarre Investigation
subtitles.english: [Title: The Great Ancient Detective's Bizarre Investigation]

subtitles.original: また悪い夢を見た。
subtitles.english: Another bad dream.

subtitles.original:
陰惨な現場が日常の探偵という職業には、
悪夢は付き物と言ってもいいでしょう。
subtitles.english:
Perhaps nightmares are the penalty a detective pays
for being in a gruesome business.

subtitles.original: だが、気にしている場合ではない。
subtitles.english: So be it. It's not about to stop.

subtitles.original:
彼女のもとに、また新たな事件が
舞い込んできているからだ。
subtitles.english: Not when there are new cases to be solved.

subtitles.original: UNHAPPY? 悩める人の子よ
subtitles.english: UNHAPPY? Children of man full of worries

subtitles.original: UNLUCKY? 人成らざる者も
subtitles.english: UNLUCKY? Those who are not yet men

subtitles.original: BE HAPPY! 弛まず目指せよ
subtitles.english: BE HAPPY! Aim without an ounce of slack,

subtitles.original: UNDEAD 生きているんだし
subtitles.english: UNDEAD You're alive, you know!

subtitles.original: 目を逸らした過去も 退屈な未来も
subtitles.english:
Even for the past you averted your gaze from
And your future with nothing fun to do

subtitles.original: カウンセリング やれやれ
subtitles.english: counseling, what a bummer

subtitles.original: 古今東西 ピースピース
subtitles.english: Throughout all ages and places, peace peace!

subtitles.original:
UNDEAD
Lyrics, Music: Ayase
subtitles.english: [Song: UNDEAD / Lyrics, Music: Ayase]

subtitles.original: ねえ何だかどうして
subtitles.english: Hey, why do I kinda get that feeling

subtitles.original: 戦ってるようなそんな気がするの
subtitles.english: that I'm fighting who-knows-what?

subtitles.original: 触れられない 触れたくもない
subtitles.english: Can't touch, don't want to touch

subtitles.original: 過去の自分自分自分自分と
subtitles.english: My past self self self self

subtitles.original: もうとっくに死んでる
subtitles.english: They've already died

subtitles.original: 透明な亡霊と対決
subtitles.english: I'm confronting see-through ghosts

subtitles.original: 幼気で痛い記憶の奥
subtitles.english: from deep in painful memories of my own tender youth

subtitles.original: 残念？ もう居ないのに
subtitles.english: Too bad? Even though they're already gone

subtitles.original: あれ？ そっちが良い？ アイロニーね
subtitles.english: Huh? Prefer that? Ironic, right?

subtitles.original: 透かされているのは現在の自分？
subtitles.english: Is your current self see-through?

subtitles.original: ナンセンス 消えないレッテル
subtitles.english: Nonsense, can't get rid of the label

subtitles.original: Yes! 要はコンプレックス
subtitles.english: Yes! Basically it's a complex,

subtitles.original: 取り憑かれているみたい
subtitles.english: Like something’s got its hold on you

subtitles.original: 巻き付いたまま
subtitles.english: I'm still all wrapped up

subtitles.original: まだ離れない
subtitles.english: they won't let me go—

subtitles.original: 在りし日の自分
subtitles.english: in my past selves,

subtitles.original: UNDEAD
subtitles.english: UNDEAD

subtitles.original: 死んじゃいない お前とお前の連鎖
subtitles.english:
They're, not, dead!
The chain linking you and you together!

subtitles.original: 生きていることとは変わり続けることだ
subtitles.english: To be alive is to continue to change

subtitles.original: 不幸に甘んじて 満足するなよ
subtitles.english:
Don't go finding satisfaction
in resigning yourself to your discontentment

subtitles.original: 幸せになろうとしないなんて卑怯だ
subtitles.english: The fact that you refuse to even try to be happy, you coward!

subtitles.original: この世この世は 奇怪奇怪ファンタジー
subtitles.english:
This world, the present world we live in
is one devilishly odd fantasy

subtitles.original: 次は鬼が出るか蛇が出るか
subtitles.english: Who knows what we'll come across next, a devil or a snake?

subtitles.original: 出会って遭ってやっと始まる物語
subtitles.english:
Our story finally starts to happen after chance
meetings and unfortunate encounters

subtitles.original: さあ人か化物か 閑話休題 ピースピース
subtitles.english:
So, will it be a human or monster?
Now, back to the topic that's at hand, peace peace!

subtitles.original: 何だかどうして
subtitles.english: Why does it feel like

subtitles.original: 未来になんぞ
subtitles.english: there's no hope

subtitles.original: 何の希望もない期待出来ない
subtitles.english:
to be had for the future
and nothing to expect

subtitles.original: ような気がして
subtitles.english: I kinda get that feeling

subtitles.original: もう随分生きている
subtitles.english: I've been living long enough.

subtitles.original: 既視感とテンプレで食傷
subtitles.english: Fed up with deja-vu and the same stuff as always

subtitles.original: 素敵な出来事の気配もない
subtitles.english: with no sign of anything wonderful coming up.

subtitles.original: 残念
subtitles.english: Too bad…

subtitles.original: 積んだ経験の因果
subtitles.english: Karma from accumulating experiences

subtitles.original: 形骸化された神話と退屈な進化
subtitles.english: with myths reduced to shells of formality and stale evolution

subtitles.english: The point, all I want is stimulation
